# Core Problem Definition

The core problem we are addressing involves a significant market opportunity in the technology sector.

This analysis draws from our [[market-analysis]] research and validates assumptions about total addressable market size.

Key findings suggest the market is growing at 15% CAGR, which enables rapid scaling of the proposed solution.
